## Key Messaging Themes (from May 2–5 Trends)

All follow-ups emphasize **rate relief + 30-day pre-June-1 hurricane season window**:

1. **Roofers:** Rate relief (11–14%) + new FBC rules (partial replacements) = quote surge opportunity. Lock in pre-season contracts.
2. **Property Managers:** Early claim awareness = referral advantage. Coordinate assessments with residents before carriers get involved.
3. **General Contractors:** Multi-trade positioning captures whole claims. FBC expansion creates more quote opportunities.
4. **Attorneys:** Underpaid claims (68% historical closure without payment) = co-counseling opportunity. High-net-worth property concentration = higher-stakes disputes.
5. **HOA Managers:** Resident complaint hotlines = first visibility. Early professional assessment = 15–25% better insurance outcomes.
